Alko Oy Keskusvarasto.reason: Major distributor; 168 days overdue suggests systemic issue—tighten to industry standard or escalate to legal.

Kesko Oyj Päivittäistavarakauppa.reason: Large retail chain just entered overdue (7 days); enforce strict 30-day terms to prevent drift.

My Dear Beer B.V..reason: Export customer 54 days late; 6–8 week DSO baseline applies but payment is now due—follow up urgently.

Own Channels (Espoo Shop, Online, Bars).reason: Protect fastest-paying segment; enforce 3–5 day collection to shore up weekly cash.

alerts.message: Invoice #4460 (€18,484) is 163 days overdue since 2025-10-30. Engage collections lawyer or suspend shipments immediately.
Invoice #3 (€1,150) is 2,063 days overdue (2020-05-07). Write off or recover via internal adjustment—do not ship new orders on credit.
Invoice #14 (€4,540) is 605 days overdue (2024-08-14). Pursue recovery action or write off; block future credit.
Invoice #5151 (€9,558) is 54 days overdue (due 2026-02-16). Contact immediately; if export DSO applies, confirm new payment date within 7 days.
Invoice #3837 (€5,882) is 280 days overdue (2025-07-05). Escalate to management; consider payment plan or write-off decision.
Invoice #5999 (€3,236) due today (2026-04-10). Confirm receipt and payment status; if unpaid by EOD, apply daily follow-up.
Invoice #6008 (€1,710) due today (2026-04-10). Treat as at-risk; confirm payment or flag for collections.
Invoice #5864 (€3,142) is 7 days overdue (due 2026-04-03). Send payment reminder; escalate if unpaid by 2026-04-13.
Invoice #5750 (€3,296) is 7 days overdue (due 2026-04-03). High-profile customer—contact supplier relationship owner for immediate follow-up.
Open POs total €79,996 against fixed costs €62,781/month. Ensure inbound deliveries align with cash collection schedule to avoid funding gaps.
Last 30 days sales (€39,326) trail budget (€201,863 YTD ~€67K/mo avg); monitor if April slowdown persists—affects May–June cash.

insights.weekly_cash_risk: €78,333 overdue AR (60 invoices) plus €6,946 due this week create acute near-term liquidity stress; three invoices >150 days overdue demand immediate recovery action.
insights.top_action: Contact Alko Oy Keskusvarasto today regarding €18,484 invoice #4460 (163 days overdue): demand payment by EOD 2026-04-17 or escalate to legal proceedings to prevent cascade default across retail network.
pattern_insights: Three invoices (Alko, Wet Goods, Salama Shop) are severely aged (>150 days), indicating historic collection failure or disputed quality—triage for write-off vs. legal recovery to unblock DSO baseline for active customers.

Recent overdue cluster (Kesko, Wittich, CBA, Made in Poland all due 2026-04-03 to 2026-04-10) suggests systematic payment delay at month-end; confirm if customers are syncing to their own month-end cycles and re-negotiate terms or payment schedules.
insights.wc_note: 62% YoY growth coupled with 6–8 week export DSO and €78K overdue AR creates dangerous working capital deficit; fixed costs of €62.8K/month require weekly cash discipline—without aggressive recovery and own-channel velocity, growth will choke.
